last_assistant_message:
## Report

**Status:** Complete. All 45 targeted tests pass; commit landed on `chore/transcript-ingest-followups`.

**Commit:** `2f19d7e9dac0229d4c853cece407532e2aad937b` — `feat(api): async extraction queue + /extractions/jobs/{id} (FEAT-257)`

**Files created**
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestOptions.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/ExtractionJobState.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/IExtractionJobStore.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/ExtractionJobStore.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/ExtractionQueueItem.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/ITranscriptExtractionQueue.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptExtractionQueue.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptExtractionWorker.cs`
- `src/AstraMemory.Api/Controllers/ExtractionJobsController.cs`
- `tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptExtractionWorkerTests.cs`

**Files modified**
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/ITranscriptIngestService.cs` — added `ProcessAtomsAsync` to the interface.
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestService.cs` — accepts the 3 new deps; atom loop refactored into `ProcessAtomsAsync`; `IngestAsync` branches on `_options.AsyncExtraction`.
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/DependencyInjection.cs` — registers `IExtractionJobStore`, `ITranscriptExtractionQueue` (singletons), `TranscriptExtractionWorker` (hosted service), binds `TranscriptIngestOptions` from configuration section `TranscriptIngest`.
- `src/AstraMemory.Api/Program.cs` — passes `builder.Configuration` into `AddMemoryServiceApplication`.
- `tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestServiceTests.cs` — 9 ctor sites updated with `SyncOptions()`, `new ExtractionJobStore()`, `new TranscriptExtractionQueue()`; default-off options preserve all original assertions.

**Build & test**
- `dotnet build src/AstraMemory.Api/AstraMemory.Api.csproj`: Build succeeded — 0 errors, only pre-existing warnings.
- Filtered test run: `Passed: 45, Failed: 0, Skipped: 0`. The 45 covers all pre-existing transcript-ingest + idempotency + scrubber + extractor + linker + embedding-similarity tests plus the 3 new ones (async-flag enqueues + returns 0, flag-off runs extractor inline, store state transitions).

**Decisions / scope adjustments**
- **Interface vs cast.** Added `ProcessAtomsAsync` to `ITranscriptIngestService` rather than casting to the concrete type in the worker — keeps the worker dependency on the abstraction and matches the pattern used elsewhere in this layer.
- **DI binding path.** Picked the "smallest delta" route the brief suggested: added an optional `IConfiguration? configuration = null` overload param on `AddMemoryServiceApplication` and a single one-line change in `Program.cs`. When configuration isn't passed (test composition / future hosts), options bind to their defaults so the sync path stays the active behavior. This adds `Program.cs` to the touched-file list but is a one-token change.
- **Worker swallows exceptions per item.** Per scope (no retry), an `Exception` marks the job `failed` and the worker continues reading; `OperationCanceledException` during shutdown is rethrown so the host can stop cleanly. v1 trade-off documented in the worker's top-of-file `// TODO(FEAT-257-followup):` block (persistence, retry/backoff, dead-letter, distributed lock, admin cancel).
- **Extra unit test added (worth keeping).** Beyond the two requested tests, included one direct `ExtractionJobStore` state-transition test (queued → running → completed with counts/timestamp) to lock the contract since the worker depends on it. 3 new tests total, all green.

**Self-review checklist** — all met: flag defaults OFF; existing tests unmodified in their behavior assertions; 3-dep ctor change applied consistently; worker creates a per-item scope via `IServiceScopeFactory`; controller returns 404 cross-tenant; deferred-work TODO present at top of worker; commit message references FEAT-257.

background_tasks.description: Wait until PR mergeable state resolves
background_tasks.command: cd "C:/work/mega/memory" && until [ "$(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" != "UNKNOWN" ]; do sleep 15; done && echo "mergeable: $(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" && gh pr checks 288 2>&1 | head -20
